questions.question: What makes Numu different from other AI consultancies?
questions.answer: We're the UK's first ethical AI workforce consultancy. While others deploy tools, we deploy governed digital employees through our proprietary Ethics Gate™ framework — ensuring every AI decision meets standards of truthfulness, trustworthiness, and justice.

questions.question: How quickly can I see results?
questions.answer: Most clients see measurable impact within 30 days of deployment. Our Growth Intelligence Audit™ provides ROI projections before you commit, so you know exactly what to expect.

questions.question: Is my data safe?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Ethics Gate™ Amanah pillar ensures GDPR-compliant data processing, encrypted storage, full audit trails, and zero third-party sharing without your explicit consent.

questions.question: What's the ROI?
questions.answer: Our clients typically see 12:1 to 31:1 ROI within the first 90 days. The Growth Intelligence Audit™ provides detailed, personalised ROI modelling for your specific business.

questions.question: Can I start small and scale up?
questions.answer: Yes. Our Starter package deploys a single digital employee so you can see the value before scaling. Most clients upgrade to the Growth package within 60 days.

questions.question: How long until I see results?
questions.answer: Initial deployment takes 30-60 days depending on your package. Most clients report time savings within the first week of deployment.
